news.headline: Atmos Energy Corp. names Jessica Pulliam as new Senior VP and General Counsel, as Karen Hartsfield retires in late 2025.
news.summary: Atmos Energy Corporation (NYSE: ATO) disclosed that Karen E. Hartsfield, the current Senior Vice President, General Counsel, and Corporate Secretary, will retire in late 2025 after a notable tenure with the company. Hartsfield, who joined Atmos Energy in June 2015, will maintain her role until December 31, 2024, following which she will transition to a Senior Advisor position. She will also remain a part of the Company’s Management Committee. This transition caps off a successful career at the company spanning over a decade.

news.headline: Chevron cuts 2025 capex budget by $2B; set at $14.5-15.5B for subsidiaries, $1.7-2B for affiliates. Commitment to cost control.
news.summary: Chevron Corporation, headquartered in San Ramon, California, revealed a 2025 organic capital expenditure forecast for consolidated subsidiaries ranging from $14.5 to $15.5 billion, along with an affiliate capital expenditure estimate ranging from $1.7 to $2.0 billion. This marks a $2 billion decline from the previous year. The company emphasized a dedication to cost and capital discipline through its 2025 capital budget and structural cost reductions.

news.headline: Guidewire's Q1 FY 2025 results show positive momentum with CEO emphasizing trust from P&C insurers.
news.summary: Guidewire (NYSE: GWRE) has released its financial results for the fiscal quarter ending October 31, 2024, in San Mateo, Calif. According to Mike Rosenbaum, the CEO of Guidewire, the company has witnessed significant momentum as Property and Casualty (P&C) insurers are turning to Guidewire for a reliable platform to drive innovation and enhance efficiency. The company showcased its success at the annual industry conference, Connections, where leading insurers globally shared their achievements.

news.headline: Messagepoint named Leader in IDC MarketScape for Intelligent CCM & Automated Document Generation in 2024 reports.
news.summary: In Toronto, Messagepoint Inc. has achieved Leader status in two significant reports by IDC. The first report, the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide Intelligent Customer Communications Management 2024 Vendor Assessment (Doc #US51359124, December 2024), recognizes Messagepoint as a Leader. Similarly, the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide Automated Document Generation 2024 Vendor Assessment (Doc #US52111324, December 2024) also positions Messagepoint in the Leaders Category. These reports highlight solutions for tailored customer communications.

news.headline: EnerSys appoints Keith Fisher as President, Energy Systems Global on Jan 2, 2025. Fisher succeeds O’Connell, brings 27 years experience.
news.summary: EnerSys, a world leader in stored energy solutions for industrial use, has appointed Keith Fisher as the President of Energy Systems Global starting from January 2, 2025. This move comes after Shawn O’Connell's promotion to President and Chief Operating Officer. Fisher, with 27 years of experience, will report directly to O’Connell. He is recognized for his expertise in enhancing operational and financial performance. EnerSys, listed on NYSE under ticker symbol ENS, is set to benefit from Fisher’s leadership in driving excellence in their global energy systems division.

news.headline: UL Solutions Inc. appoints Alex Dadakis as Chief Business Operations and Innovation Officer starting Jan 27, 2025.
news.summary: UL Solutions Inc., a prominent company listed on NYSE under the ticker ULS, based in Northbrook, Illinois, unveiled the appointment of Alex Dadakis as the Executive Vice President and Chief Business Operations and Innovation Officer. Dadakis, previously holding the role of Senior Vice President overseeing Strategy and Corporate Development at Knauf Group, Gebr KG in Germany, is slated to commence his new role on January 27, 2025. Reporting directly to Jennifer Scanlon, the CEO and President of UL Solutions, Dadakis brings a wealth of experience and expertise to his newly established position.

news.headline: DHI Group (NYSE: DHX) to join iAccess Alpha Virtual Best Ideas Winter Conference 2024 on Dec 10-11, CEO and CFO to present.
news.summary: DHI Group, Inc. (NYSE: DHX) will take part in the iAccess Alpha Virtual Best Ideas Winter Conference 2024 on December 10 and 11. CEO Art Zeile and Interim CFO Greg Schippers are set to present on December 10 at 1:30 p.m. EST. They will conduct individual meetings with institutional investors on December 11.

news.headline: Hillenbrand announces Q1 dividend of $0.225 per share, $0.01 increase annually, total $0.90 per share.
news.summary: In Batesville, Indiana on December 5, 2024, Hillenbrand, Inc. (NYSE: HI) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.225 per share on their common stock. This marks a boost of $0.01 per share annually, bringing the total rate to $0.90.

news.headline: Samsara Quarterly Results show strong growth in new frontiers, with 17% international milestone.
news.summary: San Francisco-based Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT) reported significant growth in its new areas, driven by high global demand for its solutions enhancing safety, efficiency, and sustainability. The company's wide range of products, serving various customer sizes, end markets, and regions, sets it apart in the industry and fuels its success. Notably, 17% of Samsara's revenue now comes from international markets, showcasing its expanding global presence.

news.headline: FSCO declares monthly distribution of $0.06 per share for December 2024, to be paid on December 31.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, FS Credit Opportunities Corp. (FSCO) disclosed that its Board of Directors confirmed the monthly distribution for December 2024. Shareholders will receive $0.06 per share, with the payment scheduled for December 31, 2024. For additional details regarding this distribution, kindly refer to the provided source.

news.headline: Sempra (NYSE: SRE) named among Newsweek's 'Most Responsible Companies' for 2025, marking 6th consecutive year recognized.
news.summary: Sempra, a publicly traded company (NYSE: SRE) (BMV: SRE), was recently named one of "America's Most Responsible Companies" for 2025 by Newsweek. This marks the sixth year in a row that Sempra has received this honor. The annual list evaluates and ranks companies according to their commitment to social and environmental responsibility, with Sempra's consistent recognition highlighting its dedication to these values.

news.headline: LightPath Technologies unveils OGI camera detecting ammonia & SF6 emissions, offering non-Germanium solution. News article published on PRNewswire on Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: Cutting-edge OGI camera technology is now available to detect fugitive ammonia and sulfur hexafluoride (SF6) emissions at industrial and manufacturing sites. This non-germanium based solution provides a reliable alternative for customers affected by China's ban on germanium exports to the United States. The innovative camera, unveiled in Orlando, Florida on Dec. 5, 2024, offers enhanced capabilities for identifying and monitoring these harmful emissions.

news.headline: Commercial Metals Company (NYSE: CMC) named one of America's Most Responsible Companies for 2025 by Newsweek.
news.summary: Today in Irving, Texas, on December 5, 2024, Commercial Metals Company (NYSE: CMC) revealed its inclusion in Newsweek's list of America's Most Responsible Companies 2025. This accolade, awarded by Newsweek and Statista Inc., is a testament to the company's commitment to responsible practices.

news.headline: inTEST Corp. to join 13th NYC Summit for investors, with millions expected to attend.
SEC reiterates securities claims against Binance, CZ in amended suit, reflecting same allegations but in a more court-friendly format.
news.summary: In the most recent development of the legal case brought by the SEC against Binance, Binance.US, and CZ, the regulatory agency has reiterated its claims in a manner that conforms better to court standards.

news.headline: Zumiez beats Q3 earnings estimates by 100.0%, reports EPS of $0.06. For full details visit Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Zumiez (NASDAQ: ZUMZ) released its Q3 earnings report on Thursday, December 5, 2024, at 04:05 PM. The company exceeded expected earnings by 100.0%, with an EPS of $0.06 compared to an estimated figure of [specific missing number]. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Asana (NYSE:ASAN) Q3 earnings released on Dec 5, 2024 at 04:05 PM. Beat estimated earnings by 71.0%, EPS of $-0.02.
news.summary: Asana (NYSE:ASAN) announced its Q3 earnings on Thursday, December 5, 2024, at 04:05 PM. The company exceeded estimated earnings by a significant 71.0%, posting an EPS of $-0.02. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Argan (AGX) exceeds Q3 earnings estimates with EPS of $2.0, beating by 59.0%. Full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Argan (NYSE:AGX) released its third-quarter earnings on December 5, 2024, at 04:05 PM. Investors should take note of the following key details from the report. The company surpassed projected earnings by a significant margin, with an EPS of $2.0 compared to the estimated figure. This beat the estimates by 59.0%. For a more comprehensive overview, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Petco Health and Wellness (NASDAQ: WOOF) Q3 earnings exceed estimates by 50%, with EPS of $-0.02.
news.summary: Petco Health and Wellness (NASDAQ: WOOF) released its Q3 earnings on Thursday, December 5, 2024, at 04:02 PM. The company exceeded estimated earnings by 50.0%, revealing an EPS of $-0.02. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Victoria's Secret & Co. reports Q3 sales up 7%, with net sales of $1.35 billion. Raises full year outlook with expected increase of 1-2% in fiscal year 2024.
news.summary: Victoria's Secret & Co. reports a 7% increase in sales for Q3, exceeding expectations with sales reaching $1.347 billion, 3% increase in total comparable sales. The net loss was $56 million for Q3, better than $71 million last year. The company raises its full-year outlook, now expecting net sales for 2024 to increase by 1-2%, with adjusted operating income projected at $315-345 million. Q4 2024 net sales are forecasted to rise by 2-4%, with adjusted operating income estimated at $240-270 million. The company attributes success to emotional products, strong marketing, and inventory management. CEO Hillary Super expressed optimism and gratitude to the team. Market-leading brands include Victoria's Secret and PINK. The article includes various financial figures, outlooks, and a Safe Harbor Statement outlining potential risks and uncertainties. Conference call scheduled on December 6, 2024.

news.headline: CooperCompanies reports record revenues: $1.02B in Q4 2024 (10% increase) and $3.9B in FY 2024 (8% increase). EPS also up significantly. CEO optimistic for FY 2025 with revenue guidance of $4.08-$4.16B, CVI revenue of $2.73-$2.79B, CSI revenue of $1.35-$1.37B, and non-GAAP EPS of $3.92-$4.02.Overall, strong financial performance and positive outlook for the company's future.
news.summary: CooperCompanies reported its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024, with revenue reaching $1.0184 billion, marking a 10% increase compared to the previous year. The full fiscal year 2024 revenue stood at $3.9 billion, also seeing an 8% rise. The GAAP diluted earnings per share for Q4 showed an increase of 38% to $0.58, while for the full fiscal year, it increased by 33% to $1.96. The non-GAAP diluted earnings per share for Q4 and the fiscal year also saw growth, with a 19% and 15% increase respectively.CooperVision (CVI) revenue for the fourth quarter was $676.4 million, up 9% from the previous year, while CooperSurgical (CSI) revenue reached $342.0 million, marking a 12% increase. For the full fiscal year 2024, CVI revenue totaled $2.6094 billion, up 8% from the previous year, and CSI revenue was $1.286 billion, marking a 10% increase.Looking ahead to fiscal year 2025, CooperCompanies provided its financial guidance, projecting total revenue between $4.08 to $4.158 billion, with an organic growth of 6% to 8%. The projection includes CVI revenue between $2.733 to $2.786 billion and CSI revenue between $1.347 to $1.372 billion. The non-GAAP diluted earnings per share for fiscal 2025 are expected to range from $3.92 to $4.02. CooperCompanies emphasized the importance of non-GAAP measures for investors to understand their consolidated operating results, and the difficulty in forecasting certain charges and expenses, necessitating the exclusion of such items in their guidance.

news.headline: CooperCompanies reports Q4 and full year 2024 results; ended Oct 31, 2024. The company operates on Nasdaq with the symbol COO.
news.summary: San Ramon, California-based CooperCompanies disclosed its financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year ended on October 31, 2024. The company, listed on Nasdaq as COO, is a prominent player in the global medical device sector. The report covers the financial performance of the company during this period.

news.headline: Appian (Nasdaq: APPN) to present at Scotiabank and Barclays tech conferences, meeting with investors.
news.summary: The management team of Appian, traded on Nasdaq under the symbol APPN, is scheduled to participate in upcoming technology conferences hosted by Scotiabank and Barclays. During these events, they will engage in meetings with institutional investors to discuss business updates and strategic developments.

news.headline: Valerie Haertel appointed as Vice President of Investor Relations by Onity Group Inc. in West Palm Beach, FL. Ms. Haertel to report to Sean O’Neil, Executive Vice President and CFO.
news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, a recent press release stated that Valerie Haertel has been appointed as the Vice President of Investor Relations at Onity Group Inc. (NYSE: ONIT), a prominent non-bank mortgage servicer and originator. The announcement was made on December 5, 2024. In her new role, Haertel will be reporting to Sean O’Neil, who serves as the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Onity. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's investor relations strategies and further solidify its position in the market.

news.headline: California Water Service Group acquires Kukui’ula South Shore Community Services’ wastewater system in Hawaii.
news.summary: Hawaii Water Service, also known as Hawaii Water, has successfully completed the acquisition of the wastewater system assets belonging to Kukui’ula South Shore Community Services (KSSCS).

news.headline: New meta-analysis in Annals of Surgery reveals da Vinci surgery's advantages over laparoscopic and open in seven oncologic procedures.
news.summary: In recent statistics, it has been reported that unemployment rates have dropped to 5.2% in the United States, marking a decrease from the previous month. This decrease translates to approximately 8.4 million Americans currently unemployed. Additionally, the country's GDP saw a growth of 6.4% in the first quarter of the year, reflecting a positive economic trend. However, inflation continues to rise, with the current rate standing at 2.6%, prompting concerns among consumers and policymakers alike. These economic indicators provide a snapshot of the current state of the US economy, showcasing both progress and challenges.

news.headline: Samsara reports strong Q3 fiscal year 2025 results, ending at $1.35 billion in ARR, growing 35% year-over-year. CEO Sanjit Biswas pleased with durable growth.
news.summary: Samsara Inc., listed on NYSE as IOT, a leader in Connected Operations® Cloud, announced their financial performance for the third quarter ending on November 2, 2024. The CEO, Sanjit Biswas, shared in a shareholder letter available on the Samsara investor relations website that they experienced robust and effective growth on a larger scale. They concluded Q3 with $1.35 billion in Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR), marking a 35% increase compared to the previous year.

news.headline: UiPath (NYSE:PATH) reports Q3 fiscal 2025 financial results ended October 31, 2024, maintaining a top position in AI-powered automation market.
news.summary: UiPath, Inc., a top enterprise automation and AI software company, shared its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 ending on October 31, 2024. The company's CEO, Daniel Dines, expressed enthusiasm about customers' positive feedback on their automation vision and roadmap, emphasizing their strong position in the AI-powered automation market. UiPath's stock is listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol PATH.

news.headline: Shimmick wins contract for North Hollywood to Pasadena BRT Project by LA Metro; to serve as CM/GC with Myers-Shimmick JV.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Irvine, California, Shimmick Construction Company, Inc. disclosed their involvement in the North Hollywood to Pasadena Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) Project by the Los Angeles Metropolitan Transportation Authority (LA Metro). Acting alongside Myers and Sons in the Myers-Shimmick Joint Venture (MSJV), Shimmick will operate as the Construction Manager/General Contractor (CM/GC) for the preconstruction services phase of the project. Shimmick, known for expertise in critical infrastructure, water, and transit solutions, secures a significant role in enhancing transportation systems in the region.

news.headline: Green Brick Partners, Inc. names Elizabeth K. Blake as lead independent director; ranked third largest homebuilder in Dallas-Fort Worth.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, Green Brick Partners, Inc. (NYSE: GRBK), the third-largest homebuilder in Dallas-Fort Worth, revealed the appointment of Elizabeth K. Blake as lead independent director. Green Brick, recognized as one of Fortune Magazine’s fastest-growing companies in 2023 and the quickest growing public homebuilder, announced this significant addition to its leadership team. Ms. Blake, who joined the Company’s Board as an independent director in 2014, brings her expertise to the Governance and Sustainability Committee.

news.headline: Champion Homes showcases new model in Kentucky pilot aiming to solve housing shortages, working with KMHI and City of Versailles.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, Champion Homes has recently completed the delivery and setup of a new manufactured home in Versailles, Kentucky. This initiative is part of a pilot program aimed at addressing housing inventory shortages in Central Kentucky. Collaborating with the Kentucky Manufactured Housing Institute (KMHI) and the City of Versailles, Champion Homes was chosen to oversee the design, construction, transportation, and installation of the home. The project aims to showcase factory-built housing as a viable solution to the housing shortage issue in the area. Local authorities and residents are encouraged to participate and witness the benefits of this innovative approach.

news.headline: TransMedics appoints new CFO Gerardo Hernandez; sets tighter 2024 revenue goals. Previous CFO Stephen Gordon to step down by March 31, 2025.
news.summary: TransMedics Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:TMDX) saw a decline in premarket trading on Tuesday following the announcement of Gerardo Hernandez as the new Chief Financial Officer starting on December 2, 2024. He will be taking over from Stephen Gordon, who will stay on as a non-executive employee until March 31, 2025, to facilitate a smooth transition. Waleed Hassanein, M.D., the President and CEO, expressed his excitement about the addition of Hernandez to the team. For further details, refer to the complete report on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile and Cadence partner to develop AST5000 ASIC chip for space-based internet, promising 10x processing bandwidth per satellite.
news.summary: AST SpaceMobile, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTS) has announced a collaboration with Cadence Design Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDNS) to advance its goal of addressing global connectivity challenges. The partnership is focused on providing fast, space-based internet access directly to regular smartphones to improve communication worldwide. Together, Cadence and AST SpaceMobile have co-created the AST5000 ASIC, a specialized low-power chip crucial for AST's upcoming BlueBird initiative. This innovative ASIC offers up to ten times more processing bandwidth per satellite, opening doors for seamless, space-based cellular internet services on a global scale. The AST5000 ASIC has been integrated with... (The complete article can be found on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Johnson Controls (NYSE: JCI) approves $0.37 quarterly dividend for common stock, payable on Jan. 17, 2025.
news.summary: In Cork, Ireland, on December 5, 2024, Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI), known for its expertise in smart, healthy, and sustainable buildings, announced a quarterly dividend of $0.37 per share of common stock. The dividend, approved by the board of directors, is scheduled to be paid on January 17, 2025. This decision further solidifies Johnson Controls International plc's position as a leading global player in its industry.

news.headline: TBN airs exclusive concert celebrating Andrea Bocelli's 30th career anniversary on Dec 27, 8pm ET, with performances by various artists.
news.summary: Los Angeles, December 5, 2024 - A special concert event, titled Andrea Bocelli: 30 Years of Inspiration, will be showcased by Trinity Broadcasting Network (TBN) and will feature notable performances by artists such as Andrea Bocelli, Lauren Daigle, Matteo Bocelli, Jon Batiste, and more. This event aims to celebrate the illustrious career of Andrea Bocelli and will be broadcasted to a wide audience for a memorable musical experience.

news.headline: Outbrain shareholders vote to approve issuance of 35M common shares & 10.5M Series A Convertible Preferred Shares for Teads Acquisition, expected to close in Q1 2025.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Outbrain Inc. (NASDAQ: OB), a prominent technology platform, disclosed that shareholders at the Special Meeting endorsed the proposal to issue 35 million common stock shares and 10.5 million Series A Convertible Preferred Shares for the acquisition of Teads S.A. The acquisition deal is subject to standard closing conditions and regulatory approvals, with an anticipated completion in the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Marpai completes $700,000 private placement, revolutionizing $22 billion TPA market.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on December 5, 2024, Marpai, Inc. (OTCQX: MRAI), a tech platform company, is making waves as a national Third-Party Administrator (TPA) aiming to disrupt the $22 billion TPA market with its cost-effective solutions.

news.headline: QIAGEN's EZ2 Connect sample preparation instrument reaches 1,000 placements globally, contributing to total of 5,500 EZ series instruments.
news.summary: In Venlo, Netherlands, QIAGEN revealed a milestone achievement with over 1,000 installations of the EZ2 Connect automated sample preparation equipment, an upgrade from the EZ1 line. Introduced in 2021, the enhanced EZ2 Connect has rapidly become a top instrument for sample preparation and data handling, adding to a grand total of more than 5,500 EZ series instruments distributed worldwide. This development underscores the instrument's successful adoption and strong market position.

news.headline: Hewlett Packard Enterprise announced Q4 2024 results: record revenue, exceeding full-year commitments for revenue, EPS, free cash flow.
news.summary: In Houston today, Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) reported their financial outcomes for the fourth quarter ending October 31, 2024. CEO Antonio Neri expressed satisfaction with the results, highlighting record revenue for the quarter and a successful fiscal year 2024. The company surpassed its yearly goals for revenue, EPS, and free cash flow. Neri credited this achievement to their unique offerings in hybrid cloud, artificial intelligence, and networking, signaling further advancements ahead.

news.headline: Decipher Prostate Test by Veracyte is now the sole gene expression test endorsed in NCCN® Prostate Cancer guidelines.
news.summary: A company based in South San Francisco, California, recently announced that Veracyte's Decipher Prostate Test has become the sole gene expression test endorsed in the NCCN® Prostate Cancer Guidelines. This recommendation solidifies the test's position as the preferred option for patients. This development signifies a significant milestone for Veracyte as they continue to lead in this area.

news.headline: Bill Staples becomes new CEO of GitLab (NASDAQ: GTLB) as Sid Sijbrandij steps down; Sijbrandij to be executive chair.
news.summary: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc., a prominent AI-driven DevSecOps platform traded on the NASDAQ as GTLB, revealed that Bill Staples has been appointed as the new CEO and board member starting today. Staples takes over from Sid Sijbrandij, the co-founder and previous CEO, who is stepping down from his daily responsibilities to prioritize his health. Concurrently, Sijbrandij will shift into the position of executive chair of GitLab's board of directors. This move aims to ensure a smooth transition within the company's leadership structure.

news.headline: Domo reports fiscal Q3 revenue of $79.8M, subscription revenue $71.1M, billings $73.4M, and Subscription RPO of $354.1M.
news.summary: Domo, Inc. released its fiscal third quarter results for the period ending October 31, 2024. The company reported total revenue of $79.8 million, with subscription revenue accounting for $71.1 million. Billings for the quarter reached $73.4 million. The Subscription Remaining Performance Obligations (RPO) stood at $354.1 million as of October 31, 2024, marking a 3% year-over-year increase. Additionally, the subscription RPO anticipated to be recognized beyond twelve months amounted to $145.9 million as of the same date.

news.headline: Rubrik to present at Barclays Global Technology Conference in San Francisco on December 11, 2024 at 4:15 p.m. PT. Webcast available.
news.summary: Rubrik, Inc., a Zero Trust Data Security™ Company headquartered in Palo Alto, California, revealed its upcoming participation in the Barclays Global Technology Conference. The event is set to take place in San Francisco on Wednesday, December 11, 2024, with Rubrik scheduled to present at 4:15 p.m. PT. Those interested can access the live webcast and archived presentation via the Company’s investor relations website at https://ir.rubrik.com. Rubrik, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RBRK, is dedicated to enhancing data security.

news.headline: PagerDuty appoints Sarah Franklin to Board of Directors, alongside Sameer Dholakia’s resignation. Franklin brings strong leadership experience to the company.
news.summary: PagerDuty, Inc. (NYSE: PD), a prominent player in digital operations management, revealed the induction of Sarah Franklin to its Board of Directors and Audit Committee. This comes alongside the departure of Sameer Dholakia from the Board to prioritize his role as a partner at Bessemer Venture Partners. Franklin, known for her success in developing distinctive brands and pioneering customer engagement initiatives, brings valuable expertise to the boardroom. With this change, Franklin joins the team as Dholakia exits for other professional commitments.

news.headline: Argan, Inc. announces Q3 fiscal 2025 results with revenues at $257 million, up $93 million from previous year.
news.summary: Argan, Inc. (NYSE: AGX) based in Rockville, Md., has reported its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025 ending on October 31, 2024. The company will conduct an investor conference call on December 5, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. ET. In the latest quarter, revenues amounted to $257,008, showcasing a significant increase from $163,755 in the same period in 2023, representing a rise of $93,253. Additional detailed financial information will be discussed during the conference call.

news.headline: PublicSquare closed $36.2M offering of 7.8M shares at $4.63 per share. Deal finalized on Dec 5, 2024.
news.summary: PSQ Holdings, Inc. has successfully completed a registered direct offering, selling a total of 7,813,931 shares of its Class A common stock at a price of $4.63 per share. This resulted in gross proceeds of about $36.2 million for the Company. The offering was finalized on December 5, 2024, with Roth Capital Partners facilitating the transaction. PublicSquare is identified as the leading commerce and payments ecosystem in America, emphasizing values of life, family, and liberty.

news.headline: Asana reported Q3 fiscal 2025 results, ending October 31, 2024. CEO Moskovitz mentioned launch of AI Studio driving growth opportunity.
news.summary: Asana, Inc., a prominent enterprise work management platform, recently released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025 ending on October 31, 2024. The company is listed under NYSE as ASAN and LTSE as ASAN. CEO and co-founder Dustin Moskovitz expressed excitement about the introduction of AI Studio, a new category that is expected to expand the company's Total Addressable Market (TAM) and provide notable growth opportunities. Despite being in the early stages, there has been a substantial demand from customers for this new offering.

news.headline: GitLab (GTLB) reports Q3 fiscal year 2025 results, ended October 31, 2024, highlighting platform demand and growth.
news.summary: In San Francisco, GitLab Inc. (NASDAQ: GTLB) announced its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025 ending on October 31, 2024. The company highlighted significant growth, emphasizing the increasing demand for platform-oriented software development. Sid Sijbrandij, the co-founder and executive chair of GitLab Inc., expressed that their AI-powered DevSecOps platform has resonated well with customers, serving their requirements for speedy software development.

news.headline: MP Materials Corp. will join Jefferies 2024 Battery Storage & Materials Conference on Dec 13, 2024, at 2:20 pm ET. $MP #rareearth.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, MP Materials Corp. revealed that their CFO, Ryan Corbett, will be joining the Jefferies 2024 Battery Storage & Materials Conference on December 13, 2024, at 2:20 p.m. Eastern Time. This event can be accessed via live webcasts and replays on https://investors.mpmaterials.com/. MP Materials (NYSE: MP) specializes in producing essential materials for electrification and advanced technologies. Their focus is on providing materials crucial for various high-tech applications.

news.headline: Panguna Mine Legacy Impact Assessment report released by Rio Tinto, assessing environmental and social impacts after BCL ceased operations.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Australia, Rio Tinto, a part of the Panguna Mine Legacy Impact Assessment (PMLIA) Oversight Committee, has expressed support for the unveiling of the PMLIA report. This report is deemed crucial in comprehending the enduring effects of the past mine in Bougainville. The independent analysis delves into the environmental consequences and the associated social and human rights ramifications triggered by the Panguna mine post the discontinuation of operations by Bougainville Copper Limited (BCL).
